name: Heritage Trail
description: Explore the history of Berkhamsted's most famous landmarks

questions.question: Look at the War Memorial on the High Street. How many names are listed on the main front face under the First World War heading?

reward.title: Berkhamsted Castle
reward.description: Head to the castle ruins at the end of Castle Street. Look at the English Heritage information board near the entrance gate.

questions.question: You are at Berkhamsted Castle. According to the English Heritage information board, which famous royal event took place here in 1066 shortly after the Battle of Hastings?
options: The English nobles surrendered to William the Conqueror here
The Domesday Book was written here
William the Conqueror was buried here

reward.title: St Peter's Church
reward.description: Walk along the High Street towards St Peter's Church. Look at the noticeboard on the boundary wall near the main gate for the answer to the next question.

questions.question: You are at St Peter's Church. Look at the stone archway above the main entrance door. What is carved into the stonework — a letter, a symbol, or a date?

reward.title: The Rex Cinema
reward.description: Walk along the High Street towards the Rex Cinema — one of the oldest working cinemas in the UK. Look at the front of the building for the answer to the next question.

questions.question: You are outside the Rex Cinema. What is shown on the decorative tiled or stone panel above the main entrance?
options: The name REX in large letters

reward.title: Berkhamsted Town Hall
reward.description: The old Town Hall building is nearby on the High Street. Look for the clock tower and find the year inscribed on the building facade.

questions.question: You are at the Town Hall. Look at the building facade or clock tower. What four-digit year is displayed on the building?

reward.title: Berkhamsted War Memorial
reward.description: Return to the War Memorial where you started — you've completed the Heritage Trail! Well done! 🏆
